title: Two women raped in KwaNonqaba house
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Two women, aged 19 and 20, were allegedly raped by three men in KwaNonqaba early yesterday morning, 3 November.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Two women, aged 19 and 20, were allegedly raped by three men in KwaNonqaba early yesterday morning, 3 November."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The KwaNonqaba Police Station’s spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, said according to reports, the women were seated in a house in Scholtz Street when three men entered just after 03:00 and raped them."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The case has been transferred to the Mossel Bay Family Violence, Child Protection and Sexual Offences (FCS) Unit for investigation. If you have any information on this incident, contact the unit on 044 606 2864.","html":"The case has been transferred to the Mossel Bay Family Violence, Child Protection and Sexual Offences (FCS) Unit for investigation. If you have any information on this incident, contact the unit on 044 606 2864."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Two women raped in KwaNonqaba house
